## SVAR 2.0 roadmap check

**Required for any PR that touches the SVAR 2.0 effort.** Per the Working Agreement in
[`docs/roadmap/svar-2.md`](../docs/roadmap/svar-2.md), before merging:

- [ ] Re-read `svar-2.md`, `data-model.md`, and `architecture.md`.
- [ ] Milestone checkboxes/statuses updated to match reality (`[ ]` / `[~]` / `[x]`).
- [ ] Any data-model or architecture change reconciled with the supplements **in this
      PR** — if the code now disagrees with a doc, the doc is wrong; fix it here.
- [ ] New open questions recorded in the relevant "Open questions" section rather than
      left in your head.

<!-- If this PR does NOT touch the SVAR 2.0 effort, delete the section above. -->
